Package org.aavso.tools.vstar.vela

Class JavaMethodExecutor

java.lang.Object
org.aavso.tools.vstar.vela.FunctionExecutor
org.aavso.tools.vstar.vela.JavaMethodExecutor
public class JavaMethodExecutor extends FunctionExecutor
This class executes Java methods.

  • Constructor Details

    • JavaMethodExecutor

      public JavaMethodExecutor(Object instance, Method method, Optional<String> funcName, List<String> parameterNames, List<Type> parameterTypes, Optional<Type> returnType, Optional<String> helpString)
      Construct a Java method executor.
      Parameters:
      instance - The instance of this class on which to invoke the method.
      funcName - The function's name.
      method - The corresponding Java method object.
      parameterNames - The function's formal parameter names.
      parameterTypes - The function's parameter types.
      returnType - The function's optional return type.
      helpString - The optional help string.

  • Method Details

    • apply

      public Optional<Operand> apply(List<Operand> operands) throws VeLaEvalError
      Description copied from class: FunctionExecutor
      Apply the function to the specified operands and return a result of the specified type.
      Specified by:
      apply in class FunctionExecutor
      Parameters:
      operands - A list if operands to which the function is to be applied.
      Returns:
      The optional return value.
      Throws:
      VeLaEvalError
